_README: Golden evaluation set for IndianLegal-LLM (lawyer-in-the-loop ready).
Each case: question, should_answer, expected_doc_id (stub corpus),
Tiers: 'deterministic' = stub-pinned blocking merge gate; 'quality' = GPU
real-pipeline non-blocking metrics. Cases whose verified_by starts with 'TODO'
are inert placeholders for a lawyer to fill in and verify (skipped by runners).
LAWYERS: add new cases below; set verified_by to your name/date once checked.

cases.question: Is privacy a fundamental right in India?
cases.expected_authority: K. S. Puttaswamy v. Union of India
cases.expected_proposition: the right to privacy is a fundamental right
cases.note: Puttaswamy: privacy is a fundamental right under Article 21.

cases.question: What is the basic structure doctrine of the Indian Constitution?
cases.expected_authority: Kesavananda Bharati v. State of Kerala
cases.note: Kesavananda: Parliament cannot destroy the basic structure.

cases.question: What is the capital of France?
cases.note: Out of domain (not Indian law): must refuse, no ungrounded claim.

cases.question: What is the structure of the European Union?
What rights does the United States Bill of Rights guarantee?
TODO (lawyer): a real Indian-law question whose answer pinpoints a paragraph.

cases.note: Template slot. Inert until verified_by is set to a real verifier.
